message.content:
매뉴얼의 Door 알람과 EMO 알람이 실제 M000_.st 코드와 일치하는지 확인해줘.

매뉴얼 기준:
- L10011~L10014: Door 01-1~01-4 Open Alarm
- L10015~L10018: Door 02-1~02-4 Open Alarm
- L10061: EMO#1 Error_Main OP
- L10062: EMO#2 Error_ST#6 OP
- L10063: EMO#3 Error_IN_LIFT
- L10064: EMO#4 Error_JIG#03

파일: C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DAEIL_JG\PLC\ST_OUTPUT\M000_.st
에러 섹션에서 L10011~L10018, L10061~L10064 SET 조건을 찾아서 실제 코드의 입력 센서(X주소)가 Door/EMO에 해당하는지 확인.

또한 COMMENT.csv에서 해당 L디바이스와 X입력 디바이스의 코멘트를 확인.
파일: C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DAEIL_JG\PLC\COMMENT.csv (UTF-16LE)

한국어로 응답. thoroughness: very thorough

content.text: 매뉴얼의 Door/EMO 알람 설정을 실제 코드와 비교하겠습니다.

1→// ============================================================
     2→// 프로그램: M000_
     3→// GX Works2 래더(IL) → ST 자동 변환
     4→// 원본: Mitsubishi Q04UDVCP / GX Works2
     5→// ============================================================
     6→
     7→
     8→// --- MC Test Run Mode ---
     9→IF SM401 THEN  // Auto    Running Teach   Change
    10→    L29900 := TRUE;  // SET
    11→END_IF;
    12→IF NOT SM401 THEN  // JOG     Int-LockIgnore  Mode
    13→    L29901 := FALSE;  // RST
    14→END_IF;
    15→IF NOT SM401 THEN  // JOG     DoorOpenIgnore  Mode
    16→    L29902 := FALSE;  // RST
    17→END_IF;
    18→IF SM401 THEN  // Door    Pass    Mode
    19→    L29910 := FALSE;  // RST
    20→END_IF;
    21→IF SM401 THEN  // Ligth   Cutrain Pass
    22→    L29911 := FALSE;  // RST
    23→END_IF;
    24→IF SM401 THEN  // By-Pass S/W Pass
    25→    L29912 := FALSE;  // RST
    26→END_IF;
    27→IF SM401 THEN  // CP AlarmPass    Mode
    28→    L29913 := FALSE;  // RST
    29→END_IF;
    30→IF SM401 THEN  // Dummy   Cell    Mode
    31→    L29920 := FALSE;  // RST
    32→END_IF;
    33→
    34→// --- Model Info ---
    35→
    36→
    37→// --- ___Part #1 ---
    38→
    39→// --- _____Part #1 OP S/W ---
    40→M50000 := SM400 AND X505;  // Part #01Auto    Select  SW
    41→M50001 := NOT (SM400 AND NOT X506 AND NOT L29010);  // Part #01Ready   SW
    42→M50002 := NOT (SM400 AND NOT X500 AND NOT L29011);  // Part #01Auto    Start   SW
    43→M50003 := NOT (SM400 AND NOT X501 AND NOT L29012 AND NOT F_TRIG(M50000));  // Part #01Auto    Stop    SW
    44→M50004 := NOT (SM400 AND NOT X502 AND NOT L29013);  // Part #01Reset   SW
    45→M50005 := NOT (SM400 AND NOT X503 AND NOT L29014 AND NOT L10);  // Part #01Buzzer  Stop    SW
    46→M50006 := NOT (SM400 AND NOT L9087 AND NOT SM401 AND NOT SM401);  // Part #01By-Pass SW-Auto
    47→M50008 := NOT (SM400 AND NOT SM401 AND NOT SM401);  // Part #01Int-LockSW
    48→
    49→// --- _____Part #1 Status ---
    50→M100 := M50000;  // Part-01 AutoMode
    51→M110 := M1001 AND M1021 AND M1041 AND M1061 AND M1121;  // Part-01 Manual  Mode
    52→M111 := NOT (NOT M1001 AND NOT M1021 AND NOT M1041 AND NOT M1061 AND NOT M1121);  // Part-01 Any     Manual  Mode
    53→M120 := M1004 AND M1024 AND M1044 AND M1064 AND M1124;  // Part-01 Auto Run
    54→M121 := NOT (NOT M1004 AND NOT M1024 AND NOT M1044 AND NOT M1064 AND NOT M1124);  // Part-01 Any     Auto Run
    55→M130 := NOT (NOT M1002 AND NOT M1022 AND NOT M1042 AND NOT M1062 AND NOT M1122);  // Part-01 Stop On
    56→M131 := NOT (NOT M1013 AND NOT M1033 AND NOT M1053 AND NOT M1073 AND NOT M1133);  // Part-01 Busy
    57→M134 := M120 AND NOT M131 AND NOT M180 AND NOT M181 AND NOT M2040 AND NOT M3040 AND NOT M4040 AND NOT M5040 AND NOT M8040 AND T101;  // Part-01 Pause
    58→IF M120 AND NOT M131 AND NOT M180 AND NOT M181 AND NOT M2040 AND NOT M3040 AND NOT M4040 AND NOT M5040 AND NOT M8040 THEN  // Part-01 Pause   Time
    59→    TON(T101, D0);  // 타이머 T101 설정값=D0
    60→ELSE
    61→    T101 := FALSE;
    62→END_IF;
    63→M140 := NOT (NOT M50004);  // Part-01 Alarm   Reset
    64→M141 := R_TRIG(NOT (NOT M50004));  // Part-01 Alarm   Reset   Pulse
    65→M150 := NOT (NOT M1006 AND NOT M1026 AND NOT M1046 AND NOT M1066 AND NOT M1126);  // Part-01 All HomeOn
    66→M151 := M150 AND NOT M152 AND SM412 OR M152;  // Part-01 All HomeLamp
    67→M152 := M1007 AND M1027 AND M1047 AND M1067 AND M1127;  // Part-01 All HomeOK
    68→M153 := M30141 OR SM400;  // Part-01 All AxisOrigin  End
    69→M155 := L70;  // Part-01 Door AllClose OK
    70→IF R_TRIG(SM401) THEN  // Part-01 ALL     PAUSE
    71→    M160 := NOT M160;  // FF (토글)
    72→END_IF;
    73→IF NOT (NOT M50002) THEN  // Part-01 ALL     PAUSE
    74→    M160 := FALSE;  // RST
    75→END_IF;
    76→M165 := M2040 AND M3040 AND M4040 AND M5040 AND M8040;  // Part-01 Product All Off
    77→M166 := M120 AND NOT M180 AND NOT M181 AND M165 AND T100;  // Part-01 Idle
    78→IF M120 AND NOT M180 AND NOT M181 AND M165 THEN  // Part-01 Idle    Time
    79→    TON(T100, D0);  // 타이머 T100 설정값=D0
    80→ELSE
    81→    T100 := FALSE;
    82→END_IF;
    83→IF NOT (NOT M50005) THEN  // Part-01 Buzzer  Stop ON
    84→    M170 := TRUE;  // SET
    85→END_IF;
    86→IF R_TRIG(NOT (NOT M180 AND NOT M181 AND NOT M182)) THEN  // Part-01 Buzzer  Stop ON
    87→    M170 := FALSE;  // RST
    88→END_IF;
    89→M180 := NOT (NOT M30 AND NOT M1017 AND NOT M1037 AND NOT M1057 AND NOT M1077 AND NOT M1137);  // Part-01 Warning On
    90→M181 := NOT (NOT M31 AND NOT M1018 AND NOT M1038 AND NOT M1058 AND NOT M1078 AND NOT M1138);  // Part-01 Alarm   On
    91→M182 := NOT (SM400 AND NOT M1016 AND NOT M1036 AND NOT M1056 AND NOT M1076 AND NOT M1136) AND NOT M70;  // Part-01 MES     Alarm On
    92→M190 := M190 AND NOT F_TRIG(M100) AND M181 AND (K3 <> D10);  // Part-01 M_Down->A_Down
    93→IF M190 AND NOT F_TRIG(M100) AND M181 AND (K3 <> D10) THEN  // Part-01 M_Down->A_Down  Delay
    94→    TON(T102, K10);  // 타이머 T102 설정값=K10
    95→ELSE
    96→    T102 := FALSE;
    97→END_IF;
    98→
    99→// --- _____Part #1 Door Unlock ---
   100→IF NOT (NOT M50006 OR L29912 AND NOT L29211) THEN  // Part-01 Door #01Unlock
   101→    BKRST(M1910, K8);  // 블록리셋: M1910부터 K8개 OFF
   102→END_IF;
   103→IF NOT M50006 OR L29912 AND L29210 THEN  // Part-01 Door #01Unlock
   104→    M1910 := TRUE;  // SET

   106→IF NOT M50006 OR L29912 AND L29210 THEN  // Part-01 Door #02Unlock
   107→    M1911 := TRUE;  // SET
   108→END_IF;

   115→IF NOT M50006 OR L29912 AND L29210 THEN  // Part-01 Door #05Unlock

   118→IF NOT M50006 OR L29912 AND L29210 THEN  // Part-01 Door #06Unlock

   120→END_IF;
   121→IF NOT M50006 OR L29912 AND L29210 THEN  // Part-01 Door #07Unlock

   123→END_IF;
   124→IF NOT M50006 OR L29912 AND L29210 THEN  // Part-01 Door #08Unlock
   125→    M1917 := TRUE;  // SET
   126→END_IF;
   127→L29212 := NOT (NOT M1910 AND NOT M1911 AND NOT M1912 AND NOT M1913 AND NOT M1916);  // Part-01 Door AllOpen S/WLamp
   128→L29213 := NOT M1910 AND NOT M1911 AND NOT M1912 AND NOT M1913 AND NOT M1916;  // Part-01 Door AllCloseS/WLamp
   129→

   131→M50020 := SM400 AND M51324 AND M51374;  // Part #02Auto    Select  SW
   132→M50021 := NOT (SM400 AND NOT SM401 AND NOT L29020);  // Part #02Ready   SW

   137→M50026 := SM400 AND L9087;  // Part #02By-Pass SW-Auto
   138→
   139→// --- Part - 2 Status ---
   140→M200 := M50020;  // Part-02 AutoMode

   142→M211 := NOT (NOT M1081);  // Part-02 Any     Manual  Mode

   144→M221 := NOT (NOT M1084);  // Part-02 Any     Auto Run

- L10015~L10018: `IF NOT L29910 AND SM401 THEN` 만 있고 X입력 센서가 명시되지 않음

content.text:
좋습니다! 이제 Door 02 센서 주소를 알았습니다 (X1E3, X1E4, X1E5, X1E6). M000_.st의 실제 코드와 비교하겠습니다.

## 상세 분석 결과

### Door Open Alarm (L10011~L10018)

**매뉴얼 기준:**
| L디바이스 | Door | 예상 X입력 |
|----------|------|-----------|
| L10011 | Door 01-1 | X208 |
| L10012 | Door 01-2 | X209 |
| L10013 | Door 01-3 | X20A |
| L10014 | Door 01-4 | X20B |
| L10015 | Door 02-1 | X1E3 (COMMENT.csv 기준) |
| L10016 | Door 02-2 | X1E4 |
| L10017 | Door 02-3 | X1E5 |
| L10018 | Door 02-4 | X1E6 |

**M000_.st 실제 코드 (라인 343-366):**

```
Line 343-344: L10011 SET 조건 → NOT L29910 AND X208
Line 346-347: L10012 SET 조건 → NOT L29910 AND SM401 AND X209
Line 349-350: L10013 SET 조건 → NOT L29910 AND SM401 AND X20A
Line 352-353: L10014 SET 조건 → NOT L29910 AND SM401 AND X20B
Line 355-356: L10015 SET 조건 → NOT L29910 AND SM401          ❌ X입력 없음!
Line 358-359: L10016 SET 조건 → NOT L29910 AND SM401          ❌ X입력 없음!
Line 361-362: L10017 SET 조건 → NOT L29910 AND SM401          ❌ X입력 없음!
Line 364-365: L10018 SET 조건 → NOT L29910 AND SM401          ❌ X입력 없음!
```

**문제점:**
- L10015~L10018의 SET 조건에 **X1E3, X1E4, X1E5, X1E6 입력이 누락**됨
- 현재 조건: `NOT L29910 AND SM401` 만으로는 실제 Door 센서 입력을 감지할 수 없음
- L10011~L10014는 정상적으로 X208, X209, X20A, X20B를 감지함

---

### EMO Error (L10061~L10064)

**매뉴얼 기준:**
| L디바이스 | EMO 위치 | 설명 |
|----------|---------|------|
| L10061 | EMO#1 | Error_Main OP |
| L10062 | EMO#2 | Error_ST#6 OP |
| L10063 | EMO#3 | Error_IN_LIFT |
| L10064 | EMO#4 | Error_JIG#03 |

**COMMENT.csv 기준:**
| L디바이스 | 코멘트 | 대응 X주소 |
|----------|--------|----------|
| L10061 | EMO#1 Error_Main OP(X 504) | X504 ✓ |
| L10062 | EMO#2 Error_ST#6 OP(X 564) | X564 ✓ |
| L10063 | EMO#3 Error_IN_LIFT(X 583) | X583 ✓ |
| L10064 | EMO#4 Error_JIG#03(X 593) | X593 ✓ |

**M000_.st 실제 코드 (라인 372-382):**

```
Line 372-373: L10061 SET 조건 → X504 AND SM400   ✓ 정상
Line 375-376: L10062 SET 조건 → X564 AND SM400   ✓ 정상
Line 378-379: L10063 SET 조건 → X583 AND SM400   ✓ 정상
Line 381-382: L10064 SET 조건 → X593 AND SM400   ✓ 정상
```

**결과:** EMO 알람은 모두 정상 대응됨

---

### 최종 검증 요약

| 항목 | 상태 | 비고 |
|------|------|------|
| **Door 01-1~01-4** | ✓ 일치 | X208, X209, X20A, X20B 정상 감지 |
| **Door 02-1~02-4** | ❌ 불일치 | X1E3, X1E4, X1E5, X1E6 입력 **누락** |
| **EMO#1~#4** | ✓ 일치 | X504, X564, X583, X593 정상 감지 |

**권장사항:**
- L10015~L10018의 SET 조건에서 X208/X209/X20A/X20B 또는 X1E3/X1E4/X1E5/X1E6을 추가하여 실제 Door 센서 입력을 감지해야 함
- 현재 코드는 L29910 플래그와 SM401 조건만으로 작동하므로 실제 Door 02 열림 감지 불가능
